allow: Bash(node -e "const p = require\('./package.json'\); const deps = {...p.dependencies, ...p.devDependencies}; const keys = Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('date'\) || k.includes\('picker'\) || k.includes\('community'\)\); console.log\(keys.length ? keys : 'none'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(deps\).filter\(k => k.includes\('expo'\)\).slice\(0,10\)\);")
